rationale: In the citing editorial, Huang and Fishbach (2021) appears only once as part of a grouped list of recent mitigation-related topics ('loneliness and interest in used products'). The paper is used as an illustrative example in a historical overview, not as a specific basis for theory building, hypothesis development, or interpretation in this article. There is no distinct discussion of its mechanism or findings beyond the brief mention, so the citation functions as background coverage rather than a substantive dependency.
